author: Eva Kis
title: The X’s and O’s of Advertising During the Big Game
description: Industry leaders talk about why the Super Bowl is still the ultimate advertising stage, even though strategies are changing.
content:
Key Takeaways:
  • The Big Game is still as important as ever, but real results are measured after the game ends.
  • Celebrity matters, but authenticity is stronger than star power.
